productDisplayName: Little Miss Girls Chatterbox Navy Blue Dress
description: Style NoteIf your little angel's mantra in life is to talk, talk, talk, and talk some more, this navy blue dress from little miss is perfect for her! Specially made for all the adorable little chatterboxes, this dress is all she needs to tell the world that a little talkative magpie is in their midst! Team it with pretty sandalsProduct DetailsNavy blue sleeveless dress that have thin adjustable straps, with a pink bow on the left shoulder, a cross over v-neck, straight elasticated back, graphic print on the front with layered frills at the hemMaterial and Care100% CottonMachine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
